'''âf-f-m-f''' ('''kafafmefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flipnote|flipnote]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flipnote|flipnote]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-f-m-f
|-
! Lemma
| kafafmefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifafmefoko|thifafmefoko]] || [[word:jifafmefoko|jifafmefoko]] || [[word:shifafmefoko|shifafmefoko]] || [[word:kifafmefoko|kifafmefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufafmefoko|thuthufafmefoko]] || [[word:jujufafmefoko|jujufafmefoko]] || [[word:shushufafmefoko|shushufafmefoko]] || [[word:kukufafmefoko|kukufafmefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufafmefoko|thufafmefoko]] || [[word:jufafmefoko|jufafmefoko]] || [[word:shufafmefoko|shufafmefoko]] || [[word:kufafmefoko|kufafmefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufafmefoko|thufafmefoko]] || [[word:jufafmefoko|jufafmefoko]] || [[word:shufafmefoko|shufafmefoko]] || [[word:kufafmefoko|kufafmefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefafmefoko|thefafmefoko]] || [[word:jefafmefoko|jefafmefoko]] || [[word:shefafmefoko|shefafmefoko]] || [[word:kefafmefoko|kefafmefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofafmefoko|thofafmefoko]] || [[word:jofafmefoko|jofafmefoko]] || [[word:shofafmefoko|shofafmefoko]] || [[word:kofafmefoko|kofafmefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofafmefoko|thofafmefoko]] || [[word:jofafmefoko|jofafmefoko]] || [[word:shofafmefoko|shofafmefoko]] || [[word:kofafmefoko|kofafmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfafmefoko|thĂŠfafmefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠfafmefoko|jĂŠfafmefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠfafmefoko|shĂŠfafmefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠfafmefoko|kĂŠfafmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafafmefoko|thathafafmefoko]] || [[word:jajafafmefoko|jajafafmefoko]] || [[word:shashafafmefoko|shashafafmefoko]] || [[word:kakafafmefoko|kakafafmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafafmefoko|thafafmefoko]] || [[word:jafafmefoko|jafafmefoko]] || [[word:shafafmefoko|shafafmefoko]] || [[word:kafafmefoko|kafafmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafafmefoko|thafafmefoko]] || [[word:jafafmefoko|jafafmefoko]] || [[word:shafafmefoko|shafafmefoko]] || [[word:kafafmefoko|kafafmefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
